mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.role_key FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.role_key AS roleKey, r.role_name AS roleName FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
